2603.15184.title: CATFormer: When Continual Learning Meets Spiking Transformers With Dynamic Thresholds
2603.15184.paper_summary: Although deep neural networks perform extremely well in controlled environments, they fail in real-world scenarios where data isn't available all at once, and the model must adapt to a new data distribution that may or may not follow the initial distribution. Previously acquired knowledge is lost during subsequent updates based on new data. a phenomenon commonly known as catastrophic forgetting. In contrast, the brain can learn without such catastrophic forgetting, irrespective of the number of tasks it encounters. Existing spiking neural networks (SNNs) for class-incremental learning (CIL) suffer a sharp performance drop as tasks accumulate. We here introduce CATFormer (Context Adaptive Threshold Transformer), a scalable framework that overcomes this limitation. We observe that the key to preventing forgetting in SNNs lies not only in synaptic plasticity but also in modulating neuronal excitability. At the core of CATFormer is the Dynamic Threshold Leaky Integrate-and-Fire (DTLIF) neuron model, which leverages context-adaptive thresholds as the primary mechanism for knowledge retention. This is paired with a Gated Dynamic Head Selection (G-DHS) mechanism for task-agnostic inference. Extensive evaluation on both static (CIFAR-10/100/Tiny-ImageNet) and neuromorphic (CIFAR10-DVS/SHD) datasets reveals that CATFormer outperforms existing rehearsal-free CIL algorithms across various task splits, establishing it as an ideal architecture for energy-efficient, true-class incremental learning.
2603.15184.paper_summary_zh: 儘管深度神經網絡在受控環境中表現極佳，但在現實世界的場景中，它們失敗了，因為數據並不是一次性可用的，模型必須適應一個新的數據分佈，而這個分佈可能遵循或不遵循最初的分佈。基於新數據的後續更新中，先前獲得的知識會喪失，這種現象通常被稱為災難性遺忘。相對而言，大腦可以在不發生這種災難性遺忘的情況下學習，無論它遇到多少任務。現有的用於類別增量學習（CIL）的脈衝神經網絡（SNNs）在任務累積時會遭遇性能急劇下降。我們在此介紹CATFormer（上下文自適應閾值Transformer），這是一個可擴展的框架，克服了這一限制。我們觀察到，防止SNNs遺忘的關鍵不僅在於突觸可塑性，還在於調節神經元的興奮性。CATFormer的核心是動態閾值漏積分發射（DTLIF）神經元模型，它利用上下文自適應閾值作為知識保留的主要機制。這與一種門控動態頭選擇（G-DHS）機制相結合，用於任務無關的推理。對靜態（CIFAR-10/100/Tiny-ImageNet）和神經形態（CIFAR10-DVS/SHD）數據集的廣泛評估顯示，CATFormer在各種任務拆分中超越了現有的無重播CIL算法，確立了它作為能量高效、真實類別增量學習的理想架構。
2603.15184.author: Vaishnavi Nagabhushana et.al.
2603.15184.authors: Vaishnavi Nagabhushana, Kartikay Agrawal, Ayon Borthakur
